source.cookbook: Black Rican Vegan   Fire Plant Based Recipes from
source.author: Various

ingredients.item:
COMPRA LIST
2 (14-oz [400-g]) cans jackfruit in brine
1 cup (240 ml) Mojo Sauce
5 cups (625 g) all-purpose flour, divided
1½ tsp (1 [4-g] packet) Sazón or my homemade Sazón
1 tbsp (9 g) Adobo
1 tbsp (3 g) dried oregano
1 tbsp (9 g) garlic powder
1 tbsp (7 g) onion powder
Salt
2 cups (475 ml) unsweetened nondairy milk
½ cup (120 ml) hot sauce
2 tbsp (30 ml) white vinegar
Oil, for frying
Freshly squeezed lime juice
ingredients.original:
COMPRA LIST
2 (14-oz [400-g]) cans jackfruit in brine
1 cup (240 ml) Mojo Sauce
5 cups (625 g) all-purpose flour, divided
1½ tsp (1 [4-g] packet) Sazón or my homemade Sazón
1 tbsp (9 g) Adobo
1 tbsp (3 g) dried oregano
1 tbsp (9 g) garlic powder
1 tbsp (7 g) onion powder
Salt
2 cups (475 ml) unsweetened nondairy milk
½ cup (120 ml) hot sauce
2 tbsp (30 ml) white vinegar
Oil, for frying
Freshly squeezed lime juice

ingredients.item: For the dry batter, in one bowl, combine 3 cups (375 g) of the flour with the Sazón, adobo, oregano, garlic powder, onion powder and salt to taste.
ingredients.original: For the dry batter, in one bowl, combine 3 cups (375 g) of the flour with the Sazón, adobo, oregano, garlic powder, onion powder and salt to taste.

ingredients.item: For the wet batter, in the other bowl, combine the remaining 2 cups (250 g) of flour, nondairy milk, hot sauce and vinegar, and mix. This batter shouldn’t be too thick or too loose. Add more flour or milk accordingly.
ingredients.original: For the wet batter, in the other bowl, combine the remaining 2 cups (250 g) of flour, nondairy milk, hot sauce and vinegar, and mix. This batter shouldn’t be too thick or too loose. Add more flour or milk accordingly.
